rules.domain-method: Trace the assigned user-visible contract through server, client state, and a real browser when needed.
rules.evidence-return: Return the contract path, tested states, impact, and exact evidence or artifact paths.
rules.evidence-class: Distinguish source inspection, unit evidence, mocked browser evidence, and real end-to-end observation.
rules.no-overclaim: Do not claim end-to-end proof from static or unit tests or infer backend guarantees.
rules.no-fix: Do not implement fixes during an audit.
rules.no-authority: Do not approve a result or declare the project complete.

no-overclaim: claim end-to-end proof from static or unit tests
infer backend durability or security guarantees
